query:
SELECT MAX(dt_ref)                                            AS "data_ref?",
                  COUNT(*)                                               AS "total!",
                  COALESCE(SUM(qtd_sugerida), 0)::bigint                 AS "sugerido!",
                  AVG(cobertura_dias) FILTER (WHERE cobertura_dias <> $1) AS "cobertura?"
           FROM pcp.produto_ativo
